account-registry.name: Name
account-registry.also-register-as-known-counterparty: Also register as a Known Counterparty
account-registry.error-occurred-adding-counterparty: An error occurred while adding the counterparty
account-registry.counterparty-name-already-exists: Counterparty name already exists. Please choose another name
account-registry.tracking-mode-full-tracking-description: All movements involving this wallet are ingested. Use for wallets the project directly transacts from.
account-registry.tracking-mode-balance-only-description: Only the wallet's balances are tracked. Movements are selectively ingested - only when the other side is a Financial counterparty. Use for high-volume programs/smart contracts (like AMMs).
account-registry.tracking-mode-pass-through-description: For wallets the project funds but doesn't own - e.g., a founder's allowance wallet that pays contributors. Balance is not tracked. Movements are ingested only when the counterparty is Financial.
account-registry.tracking-mode-third-party-note: Onchain tracking modes don't apply to third-party custodial accounts.
account-registry.tracking-mode-third-party-custodial-acco: Balances held by a third-party custodian
account-registry.tracking-mode-movements-description: Onchain deposits from registered wallets ingested.
account-registry.tracking-mode-balance-only-ingestion-des: onchain movements involving this deposit address ingest only when the other is Full Track or a Financial counterparty.
account-registry.tracking-mode-no-onchain-address-descrip: no onchain address is registered for this account.
